collections.title: Storytellers, in life
collections.description: The wider cast, out in the world — forty candid, in-life moments.

collections.title: Amara & Ben
collections.bio: couple in their mid-30s: Amara, a Black woman with short natural hair, warm open face, cream ribbed sweater; and Ben, a white man with sandy hair and stubble, soft flannel overshirt.

collections.title: Black man
collections.bio: 38-year-old Black man, clean fade, charcoal henley, in a sunlit kitchen, a wide, smooth, polished gold band — the Pulse ring — on the finger, easy warmth, mid-laugh softening.

collections.title: Black man
collections.bio: 22-year-old Black man, new graduate, in a bright bedroom with moving boxes, hoodie, hopeful open face, a wide, smooth, polished gold band — the Pulse ring — on the finger, on the edge of something.

collections.title: Black woman
collections.bio: 63-year-old Black woman, choir director, bright scarf, in a sunlit church hall, hands mid-gesture, a wide, smooth, polished gold band — the Pulse ring — on the finger, radiant and grounded.

collections.title: Black woman using a wheelchair…
collections.bio: 47-year-old Black woman using a wheelchair by a big studio window, bright headwrap, painter's smock, brushes in hand, a wide, smooth, polished gold band — the Pulse ring — on the finger, luminous focus.

collections.title: Black woman with silver locs
collections.bio: 61-year-old Black woman with silver locs, reading glasses pushed up, mustard scarf, in a bright plant-filled room, a wide, smooth, polished gold band — the Pulse ring — on the finger, serene and warm.

collections.title: East Asian man
collections.bio: 27-year-old East Asian man, warm smile, cropped hair, olive linen shirt, at a sunlit cafe table, a wide, smooth, polished gold band — the Pulse ring — on the finger, relaxed and present, looking softly toward camera.

collections.bio: 37-year-old Indian woman, schoolteacher, cardigan, chalk dust on her sleeve, in a bright empty classroom, a wide, smooth, polished gold band — the Pulse ring — on the finger, gentle and attentive.

collections.title: Japanese man
collections.bio: 58-year-old Japanese man, fisherman, weathered face, canvas jacket, at a harbour in soft morning light, a wide, smooth, polished gold band — the Pulse ring — on the finger, quiet and steady.

collections.title: Latina woman
collections.bio: 34-year-old Latina woman, dark wavy hair, freckles, cream turtleneck, by a large window, a wide, smooth, polished gold band — the Pulse ring — on the finger, calm half-smile.

collections.title: White man
collections.bio: 41-year-old white man, young dad, tired kind eyes, stubble, grey tee, a baby carrier on his chest, in a sunlit hallway, a wide, smooth, polished gold band — the Pulse ring — on the finger, soft half-smile.

collections.title: White man
collections.bio: 71-year-old white man and 69-year-old white woman, a retired couple, in a sunlit garden doorway, gardening clothes, both with a wide polished gold band, easy companionship.

collections.title: White woman with a soft white…
